name: CC10X BUILD - API Endpoint Implementation
description: TDD-enforced implementation of a REST API endpoint with parallel review

inputs.request: Add a PATCH /api/users/:id endpoint with field-level validation and audit logging

memory.patterns: Project uses Zod for validation, Winston for logging

phases: clarify-requirements (read plan file, define acceptance criteria)
tdd-red (write failing endpoint tests, exit code 1)
tdd-green (implement endpoint with Zod validation, exit code 0)
